fact: FRESNEL_CAN1: 100-qubit 2D rubidium, Sherbrooke Quebec, analog mode only
19 QPU submissions, 1000 shots/row (except Incarnate Graph at 402)
Le venticinque stanze (N=25): best-shot 1.000, valid-IS 53.1%, exact-MIS 2.4%
Galileo (N=65): register ratio 0.966, canonical 14/23=0.61, valid-IS 55.9%
Ausonius (N=27): ratio 1.000, valid-IS 10.0%, near-valid 36.2%
Dante Divina Commedia (N=100): ratio 0.917, valid-IS 43.7%
SA recall ceiling <0.5 at N>=30 in 2D, genre-independent, geometric origin
2D-UDG kissing number=6 limits recall; degree>6 graphs cannot embed fully in 2D
3D Ausonius recall: 2D=0.344, 2L=0.442, 3D=0.571; canonical ratio 0.60 on EMU
3D Augustine recall: 2D=0.364, 2L=0.466, 3D=0.583; canonical ratio 0.50 on EMU
3D Boethius recall: 2D=0.339, 2L=0.392, 3D=0.543; canonical ratio 0.929 on EMU (cleanest)
Bilayer closes 30-50% of 2D-to-3D gap; Pascal-Menil EMU ratio 1.00, valid-IS 78.6%
Baseline pulse: Omega=3.3 rad/us, T=4us; T=6us at N>=81
Variational pulses: +3-6% valid-IS on exact-UDG, ratio stays 1.000
Tighter blockade margin r_nnn/Rb lifts rows from 0/1000 to 0.84-1.00 band
Il castello: needs Rb>14.14um, Omega<0.11 below FRESNEL floor pi/10~0.314; king-only subgraph ratio 0.938
Eighty-One Faces: U/Omega~1.4 at sqrt(5) pairs, ratio 0.615; needs local detuning or ancilla
Friar's Notebook: N=20, dodecahedron, simplest text requiring full 3D
3D Rydberg machine ~100 atoms would likely escape classical exact simulation (3D entanglement grows faster)
QOuLiPo design tiers: k-NN-led (non-UDG), graph-design-led (mixed), register-led (exact UDG/UBG)
QOuLiPo 29 texts in (tier x geometric-class x rigidity) space; prose by Claude Opus 4.6/4.7
Generation: m threads from pool T, pages sharing tau threads = edges; d=k/N; high-density k>=0.30N

Dalyac-Henriet theorem: degree<=6 admits exact 3D-array embedding; k-NN text graphs typically exceed this
Unique to neutral atoms: 3D registers (vs superconducting/trapped-ion/photonics/spin)
